en_definition: having the power, skill, or means to do something
examples: She was able to finish the project on time.
Are you able to come tomorrow?

pl.definition: mający możliwość lub umiejętność zrobienia czegoś

en_definition: to start doing or experiencing something
examples: She began to read the letter.

en_definition: to hold and move something from one place to another
examples: Can you carry this bag for me?

pl.definition: trzymać i przenosić coś z miejsca na miejsce

en_definition: to make a choice after thinking about the options
examples: I can't decide what to eat.

en_definition: before the usual or expected time
a group of people related by blood or marriage
examples: My family lives in a small town.

pl.definition: grupa osób spokrewnionych lub związanych małżeństwem

en_definition: a piece of land next to a house where flowers and plants grow
examples: She grows tomatoes in her garden.
The children played in the garden.

pl.definition: kawałek ziemi przy domu, gdzie rosną kwiaty i rośliny

en_definition: feeling or showing pleasure and contentment
examples: She felt happy after hearing the news.

pl.definition: odczuwający lub wyrażający przyjemność i zadowolenie

en_definition: a thought or suggestion about a possible course of action
examples: I have an idea for the project.

pl.definition: myśl lub propozycja dotycząca możliwego działania

en_definition: paid work that a person does regularly
to continue to have or hold something; to maintain
to gain knowledge or skill through study or experience
examples: She learned to drive last summer.

pl.definition: zdobywać wiedzę lub umiejętność poprzez naukę lub doświadczenie

en_definition: a place where goods are bought and sold
examples: We buy vegetables at the market.

pl.definition: miejsce, gdzie kupuje się i sprzedaje towary

en_definition: a word or phrase that identifies a person, place, or thing
examples: The name of the city is Prague.

pl.definition: słowo lub fraza identyfikująca osobę, miejsce lub rzecz

en_definition: to move something so that it is no longer closed; to begin

pl.definition: poruszać coś tak, by nie było zamknięte; zaczynać

en_definition: human beings in general; more than one person
examples: Many people came to the concert.

pl.definition: istoty ludzkie ogólnie; więcej niż jedna osoba

en_definition: a sentence used to request information
examples: Can I ask you a question?

en_definition: to look at written words and understand their meaning
examples: I read a book every week.

pl.definition: patrzeć na napisane słowa i rozumieć ich znaczenie

en_definition: little in size; not large
examples: They live in a small house.

en_definition: the ongoing progression of events from past to future

pl.definition: ciągły postęp zdarzeń od przeszłości do przyszłości

en_definition: to know or grasp the meaning of something
to a high degree; extremely
a clear liquid that falls as rain and is used for drinking
examples: Can I have a glass of water?
The water in the lake is clean.

pl.definition: przezroczysty płyn, który spada jako deszcz i służy do picia

en_definition: a period of 365 or 366 days
examples: I've lived here for two years.

en_definition: the number 0; nothing in quantity
on the subject of; concerning
in the space separating two things
examples: The shop is between the bank and the café.

en_definition: to make or become different

pl.definition: czynić innym lub stawać się innym

en_definition: not the same as another or each other
examples: These two books are very different.

pl.definition: nie taki sam jak inny; odmienny

en_definition: as much or as many as required
examples: There is enough food for everyone.

en_definition: a person you know well and like
examples: I met a friend for coffee.

en_definition: very large or important; wonderful
to give assistance or support to someone
examples: Can you help me with this?

en_definition: having great significance or value
a very short time ago; only; exactly
to be aware of something through observation or information

pl.definition: być świadomym czegoś dzięki obserwacji lub informacji

en_definition: to have one's home in a particular place; to be alive

pl.definition: mieć dom w określonym miejscu; być żywym

pl.definition: monety i banknoty używane do kupowania

en_definition: recently made or discovered; not existing before

en_definition: having lived for many years; not new

pl.definition: żyjący od wielu lat; nie nowy

en_definition: a particular position or area
to move quickly on foot
examples: The children ran across the park.

en_definition: a place where children go to learn

en_definition: to use the mind to form ideas or opinions
examples: I think it will rain today.

en_definition: to employ something for a purpose
to desire or wish for something

en_definition: to do a job or task; to function
the earth and all the people on it

examples: The plane took off on time.
